channel.title: CISPOLY Blog
channel.description: Latest updates, research findings, and insights into methylation-based cancer triage.

item.title: Understanding Methylation Triage
item.description: How PAX1 and JAM3 methylation markers provide superior specificity compared to traditional HPV testing.

item.title: Welcome to CISPOLY Blog
item.description: We are excited to launch our new blog to share the latest updates on cancer triage and methylation technology.
